name: Synup Social vs. HubSpot
hero_summary: The secret to social media success? Engaging your audience with great, relevant content. Switch from HubSpot, and start using a platform that works for you - creating AI-generated posts, doing trend and competitor research, analyzing engagement post-by-post, and more. In a toss-up between HubSpot and Synup Social, the choice is obvious. With better features at a competitive price, it’s no surprise that customers love Synup Social!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Get more out of your social media management platform
section_2_summary: Want to stay ahead of the curve? Synup Social keeps you in the know, giving you everything from post-by-post analytics and custom reporting to trending post ideas. With superior analytics, advanced multi-brand and multi-location management capabilities, inspired content creation, and more, Synup Social saves you time and money. Although HubSpot is a renowned all-in-one platform, its social media management capabilities just don’t cut it. Take a look:
section_2_slider_1_summary: HubSpot leaves you to your own devices when it comes to content optimization. Synup Social recommends the best time to post based on your past posts’ performance and when your audience is the most active - so you can maximize views and engagement. Plus, enjoy game-changing recommendations and insights with post-by-post analytics!
section_2_slider_2_summary: Post creation is our specialty. HubSpot leaves you to your own devices with content creation. But Synup Social is powered by AI, so you can revive your best posts automatically, stay inspired with automated trend research, and let Synup Social write your posts for you. Get ready to be inspired.
section_2_step_3_summary: HubSpot’s approval workflow leaves much to be desired. Empower your team with Synup Social’s collaboration tools. Supervisors and clients can easily approve posts and provide feedback, ensuring that every published post adheres to your brand's distinct voice. Teamwork has never been easier!
section_2_slider_4_summary: Ready to expand? Synup Social grows with your business, whether you’re an agency adding clients or you’re catering to local audiences with location-specific accounts. HubSpot doesn’t support multiple accounts, making it a no-go for agencies and multi-location businesses. Enjoy simplified growth with Synup Social, and manage all your accounts from one easy platform.

why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_heading: What do users love about Synup Social?
testimonial_summary: From expediting approval workflows and advanced analytics to revolutionary post ideas and optimization, Synup Social makes your life easier while saving you time and money. Teams of all sizes love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Start using Synup Social’s collaboration workflow today, so you can spend less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with your audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: With robust analytics and advanced content creation abilities, Synup Social makes your team more productive and inspired while driving results. seo.description: Looking for a better alternative to HubSpot for your social media scheduling and management? Explore the top HubSpot alternatives on Synup. Compare features, pricing, and user reviews to find the perfect social media tool for your business.
